detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TakmorDAO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TakmorDAO.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TakmorDAO.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TakmorDAO.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TakmorDAO.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TakmorDAO.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TakmorDAO.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TakmorDAO.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TakmorDAO.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TakmorDAO.sol#909)
	TakmorDAO._rOwned (TakmorDAO.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TakmorDAO._takeTeam(uint256) (TakmorDAO.sol#921-929)
	- TakmorDAO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TakmorDAO.sol#881-917)
	- TakmorDAO.balanceOf(address) (TakmorDAO.sol#469-473)
	- TakmorDAO.constructor() (TakmorDAO.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TakmorDAO.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TakmorDAO.sol#935)
	TakmorDAO._rTotal (TakmorDAO.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TakmorDAO._getCurrentSupply() (TakmorDAO.sol#1077-1087)
	- TakmorDAO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TakmorDAO.sol#933-939)
	- TakmorDAO.constructor() (TakmorDAO.sol#403-433)
	- TakmorDAO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TakmorDAO.sol#565-587)

	External calls sending eth:

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](TakmorDAO.sol#L907)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](TakmorDAO.sol#L909)
	[TakmorDAO._rOwned](TakmorDAO.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TakmorDAO._takeTeam(uint256)](TakmorDAO.sol#L921-L929)
	- [TakmorDAO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](TakmorDAO.sol#L881-L917)
	- [TakmorDAO.balanceOf(address)](TakmorDAO.sol#L469-L473)
	- [TakmorDAO.constructor()](TakmorDAO.sol#L403-L433)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](TakmorDAO.sol#L765)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](TakmorDAO.sol#L935)
	[TakmorDAO._rTotal](TakmorDAO.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [TakmorDAO._getCurrentSupply()](TakmorDAO.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [TakmorDAO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](TakmorDAO.sol#L933-L939)
